candidates.title: Luxury E-commerce Brand Visuals
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I’m creating a high-end brand that unites graphic design, videography, photography and a streamlined e-commerce website. The entire identity must feel unmistakably premium: think a deep black canvas paired with crisp white typography, minimal ornamentation, and a confident, modern layout. Logo & Core Identity The logo has to rely purely on typography—no symbols, icons or complex marks. Clean letterforms, balanced kerning and a subtle nod to luxury brands such as Saint Laurent or Balenciaga are key. Alongside the primary lock-up, I’ll need a monochrome palette, font recommendations and usage rules so every asset—from product packaging to video title cards—stays consistent. E-commerce Experience The site’s main job is selling. It should showcase products elegantly while highlighting verified customer reviews (this is the one essential feature I specified). candidates.tools: Photoshop · Animate — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: Logo Redesign & Brand Refresh for AVINSTAL – Projection Mapping & AV Technology Company ## About Us AVINSTAL is a technology company with more than 10 years of experience specializing in: - Architectural projection mapping - 3D video mapping on buildings and structures - Professional projection systems - Audio-Video system integration - Multimedia installations - Event technology solutions Over the years, our company has evolved significantly, and we are now looking to modernize our visual identity with a professional logo redesign that better reflects our expertise, innovation, and future direction. Our current logo is attached for reference. --- ## Project Objective We are not looking for a completely unrelated new logo. candidates.title: Instagram Thumbnails, Posters & Logos
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I’m refreshing my brand’s Instagram presence and need a designer who can create a cohesive visual suite that works flawlessly on the platform. The primary purpose of every asset is social-media engagement, so layouts must pop in the feed, respect Instagram’s current sizing rules, and keep file weight light without sacrificing clarity. Deliverables • 5–7 eye-catching thumbnails for Reels/IGTV (1080×1920, layered PSD/AI + ready-to-post PNG) • 2 promotional posters adaptable for both feed (1080×1350) and story (1080×1920) placements • A versatile, memorable logo delivered in vector (AI/SVG) and transparent PNG formats Each piece should share a unified colour palette and typography style so the brand feels instantly recognisable. I’ll supply reference imagery, copy, and hex codes at kickoff; you bring the fresh concepts, modern gradients, and bold type treatments that stop the scroll. Final

candidates.title: MidSight Noir
candidates.tools: Photoshop — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: MidSight Noir is a luxury-inspired creative studio specializing in high-impact digital design, branding, and visual storytelling. Built on a dark aesthetic philosophy, we transform ideas into bold, minimal, and visually powerful identities that leave a lasting impression. We craft premium design solutions that blend elegance with edge—helping modern brands stand out in a saturated digital world through clean visuals, strategic creativity, and refined execution. Our Signature Services: • Luxury Logo Design (minimal, vector, monochrome, custom identity) • Premium Graphic Designing (posters, banners, social media creatives) • Instagram Page Styling & Enhancement (feed aesthetics, branding systems) • Social Media Content Design & Management • Professional Photo & Video Editing (cinematic, color-graded visuals) • Brand Identity Development (full visual direction & consistency) • Marketing Cre

candidates.title: Veterinary Client Education Materials Creation
candidates.tools: Illustrator · InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I want to roll out a clear, visually engaging set of client-education materials that will directly improve patient care in my veterinary practice. These resources should translate complex medical advice into language pet owners immediately understand, empowering them to follow treatment plans, schedule follow-ups on time, and recognize early warning signs without panic-scrolling the internet. Scope The content will cover common preventive care topics (vaccination, nutrition, parasite control), post-operative and medication instructions, and quick-reference emergency guidance. I’m open to both print-ready handouts (tri-fold brochures, A4 posters) and digital formats such as shareable PDFs, email attachments or short slide decks for our consult rooms and website. Deliverables • 5–7 print-ready handouts (Adobe InDesign or high-resolution PDF) • 1 concise take-home booklet (≤12 pages) format

candidates.title: Minimalist Logo & Social Media Kit
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I need a fresh, minimalist brand identity built around a new logo. The logo is my top priority, and it must be clean, memorable, and fully scalable. Alongside the logo, I also want matching creative assets for my online presence so every touch-point feels consistent and professional. Here’s exactly what I’d like delivered: • Primary logo in vector (AI, SVG) and raster (PNG, JPG) formats, plus dark-light and square variations • Coordinated designs for social media posts, banners, posters, and YouTube thumbnails that echo the logo’s minimalist look • Source files for each item so I can update text or imagery later • A brief visual guide showing safe-zone, typography, and color specs Style & direction Minimalist is non-negotiable; think clean lines, clever negative space, and no unnecessary ornaments.
